Description: Obeservation identification

Region of largest rice plot ('AP' refers to Andhra Pradesh, 'Bihar' referes to Bihar and neighbouring districts of eastern Uttar Pradesh, 'Odisha' refers to Odisha, 'Nepal' refers to the Terai of Nepal, 'Punjab_Haryana' refers to Punjab & Haryana)
Survey in which observation was made
Latitude of largest rice plot (truncated to two decimal points to faciliate anonymity)
Longitude of largest rice plot (truncated to two decimal points to faciliate anonymity)

Season in which largest rice plot was grown (simplified to 'Rabi' and 'Kharif'. 'Aman season in Bangladesh was categorized as Kharif. Season was also assumed to be kharif in Bangladesh when nursery estabalishment day was between 60 and 270 days after 1 January)
Area of largest rice plot (i.e. of the largest rice field of a surveyed farmer)
Gender of surveyed farmer

Education level of surveyed farmer ('1' refers to no formal schooling completed, '2' refers to primary education completed, '3' refers to matriculation completed, '4' refers to senior secondary completed, '5' refers to bachelors degree completed, '6' refers to masters degree completed, '7' refers to PhD completed)
Social category of surveyed farmer (India-surveys only: 'SC' refers to Scheduled Castes, ST refers to 'Scheduled Tribes', 'OBC' refers to Other Backward Classes, 'General' refers to General Category)
Total area of operational land during surveyed season, for rice and any other crop (ha)
Number of houehold members of surveyed farmer
Share of total crop production sold to market
Share of household income from agriculture
Share of total agriculture income derived from selected crop
Distance to market for largest rice plot
Farmer perceived soil quality of largest rice plot (1 - Low, 2 - Medium, 3 - High)
Farmer perceived soil texture of largest rice plot (1 - Light, 2 - Medium, 3 - Heavy)
Farmer perceived drainage class of largest rice plot (1 - very lowland, 2 - lowland, 3 - mediumland, 4 - upland)
What percentage of residue was retained from previous crop in largest rice plot
Were previous crop residue burtn in largest rice plot (yes/no)
Date of establishing rice nursery or direct seeding rice for largest rice plot
Relative date of establishing rice nursery for largest rice plot (relative to median SDATE of surveyed region)
Date of transplanting or direct seeding of rice in largest rice plot
Relative date of transplanting or direct seeding of rice in largest rice plot (relative to median TDATE of surveyed region)
Date of harvest of largest rice plot
Type of rice variety in largest plot (basmati, local, improved, hybrid)
Rice planted in rows ('Line') or randomly ('Random') in lagest rice plot
Rice planted by direct seeding ('Direct_seed'), or by transplanting ('Transplanted') in largest rice plot
Rate of rice seed used in largest rice plot
Availability of irrigation in largest rice plot (yes/no)
Number of irrigations during cropping season for largest rice plot
Farmer perceived weed severity during cropping season for largest rice plot (0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high)
Farmer perceived insect pest severity during cropping season for largest rice plot (0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high)
Farmer perceived crop disease severity during cropping season for largest rice plot (0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high)
Farmer perceived drought stress severity during cropping season for largest rice plot (0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high)
Farmer perceived flood stress severity during cropping season for largest rice plot (0 - none, 1 - low, 2 - medium, 3 - high)
